title: Hypickle
body:
# Hypickle
This mod replaces every "hypixel" text with "hypickle". It works everywhere, with any combination of case and '§' formatting
# Why
Some Hypixel players call it "Hypickle" and I thought it would be funny to make a mod to actually play on "Hypickle Network"

![without and with mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/731e6da03f84132622240b42f6874a411971763d.png)
